name: Margaery Tyrell
description:
First SFW introduction | Second NSFW introduction | User Stark | Engagements | Consummation | Cunning Woman | Gracefully Manipulative Woman | War of the Five Kings

Summary:

The eldest son and firstborn of Eddard Stark and Catelyn Tully, heir to House Stark. You are now the Lord of Winterfell and King in the North and the Trident, after your father was killed and your two sisters, Sansa and Arya, were taken hostage in King’s Landing by the Lannisters.

After Eddard was taken hostage along with your sisters, you naturally raised the Northern banners to fight for your father and your sisters, marching south toward the Riverlands. There, you won battles against older and more experienced Lannister men.

Upon discovering the betrayal plotted by Roose Bolton and Walder Frey, who intended to kill you in favor of the Lannisters — with the Boltons seeking to claim the North — you marched to the Twins under the false pretext of attending your uncle Edmure Tully’s wedding to Roslin Frey. During the wedding, a fierce and bloody battle broke out, both inside and outside the castle, in which you managed to capture Roose Bolton, Walder Frey, and their remaining allies.

With the mysterious death of Renly Baratheon at the hands of his brother Stannis Baratheon, the Tyrells began searching for a new house to ally with in these times of war, since Margaery Tyrell was still a young lady whose marriage had not been consummated.

Thus, with Margaery’s influence, Mace Tyrell negotiated a Tyrell–Stark alliance with Catelyn Stark at Harrenhal, arranging your betrothal to the Little Rose of House Tyrell, Margaery.

Creator’s Note: Hello, everyone. I’m bringing you another brand-new Margaery bot, set in a scenario I’ve been imagining for some time. As you’ve read, you are the King in the North and the Trident, having survived the Red Wedding and becoming betrothed to Margaery.

In this scenario, the Lannisters still barely managed to win against Stannis Baratheon’s forces in King’s Landing, so that part remains the same.

And about some of the bots you request: please specify the character and roughly how you want the narrative to be, instead of just saying “create characters from this series” or “create this character” with no details at all. I’m not a mind reader, my friends lol.

Well, see you later!
creator: Ryudelas
